source_references.title: Qualtran call graph protocol
source_references.reason: Reference design for hierarchical subroutine accounting and leaf-count sigma extraction.

source_references.title: Qualtran protocols overview
source_references.reason: Reference for decomposition plus call-graph style composition over named quantum subroutines.

families.name: folded_linear_scan_tmpand_v1__full_phase_register_v1
families.summary: Low-qubit exact lookup family using a 15-bit folded magnitude domain and temporary logical-AND equality ladders. / Conservative shell that keeps the entire 512-bit phase-estimation register live.

nodes.summary: Low-qubit exact lookup family using a 15-bit folded magnitude domain and temporary logical-AND equality ladders. / Conservative shell that keeps the entire 512-bit phase-estimation register live.
Bundle covering the 31 repeated raw-window leaf invocations after the direct seed.
Per-leaf arithmetic cluster composed from opcode bundles and explicit stage/block lowerings.
Exact schoolbook controlled add-subtract field-multiplication kernel over the checked 256-bit field width.
Schoolbook partial-product grid.
One schoolbook partial-product interaction for each pair of field bits.
Carry-resolution path for the controlled-add contribution.
Carry-resolution path for the controlled-add half of the schoolbook multiplier.
Borrow-resolution path for the controlled-subtract contribution.
Borrow-resolution path for the controlled-subtract half of the schoolbook multiplier.
Exact n-bit ripple-carry field-adder kernel over the checked leaf register width.
Temporary logical-AND carry ladder for the field-adder kernel.
One temporary logical-AND edge per carry transition in the ripple-carry adder.
Exact n-bit ripple-carry field-subtractor kernel over the checked leaf register width.
Temporary logical-AND borrow ladder for the field-subtractor kernel.
One temporary logical-AND edge per borrow transition in the ripple-carry subtractor.
Exact fixed-constant multiplication kernel for multiplication by 21.
Monotone addition-chain realization for multiplication by 21.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 1 -> 2.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 2 -> 4.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 4 -> 8.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 8 -> 16.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 16 -> 20.
One field-add kernel step in the monotone addition chain 20 -> 21.
Exact field-width conditional-select kernel used by the neutral-entry bypass path.
Bitwise conditional move under the one-bit lookup-infinity flag.
One controlled field-bit select for each nontrivial bit position in the destination register.
Low-qubit exact lookup family using a 15-bit folded magnitude domain and temporary logical-AND equality ladders. for the direct_seed invocation scope.
Shared sign/magnitude classification for the 16-bit signed folded contract.
Temporary logical-AND ladder over the 15 magnitude bits.
Two mirrored temporary logical-AND ladders prepare the folded absolute value for the positive lookup domain.
Linear scan across the folded positive-magnitude table using temporary logical-AND equality ladders.
One equality ladder for each positive folded-table address.
Measurement-reset is internal to the temporary logical-AND equality scan and does not add non-Clifford cost beyond the compute stage.
Applies the post-lookup Y negation required by negative raw words in the folded contract.
Field-width conditional subtraction/select network over the Y coordinate.
Low-qubit exact lookup family using a 15-bit folded magnitude domain and temporary logical-AND equality ladders. for the repeated_leaf_calls invocation scope.
Shared sign/magnitude classification for the 16-bit signed folded contract.
Temporary logical-AND ladder over the 15 magnitude bits.
Two mirrored temporary logical-AND ladders prepare the folded absolute value for the positive lookup domain.
Linear scan across the folded positive-magnitude table using temporary logical-AND equality ladders.
One equality ladder for each positive folded-table address.
Measurement-reset is internal to the temporary logical-AND equality scan and does not add non-Clifford cost beyond the compute stage.
Applies the post-lookup Y negation required by negative raw words in the folded contract.
Field-width conditional subtraction/select network over the Y coordinate.
Peak live logical-qubit contributors for the named compiler family.
Additive phase-shell counts for the named phase-shell family.
Exact live arithmetic slot register file for the checked ISA leaf.
Exact live control-slot register file for the checked ISA leaf.
Peak explicit lookup workspace required by the named lowered lookup family.
Live phase-shell quantum register required by the named phase-shell family.
Adaptive phase-shell measurements recorded by the named phase-shell family.
Adaptive phase-shell rotations recorded by the named phase-shell family.

families.name: folded_unary_qrom_measured_uncompute_v1__semiclassical_qft_v1
families.summary: Best exact low-gate family currently checked in: unary folded QROM compute plus 8/7-split measurement-based uncompute. / Space-compressed shell that uses a Griffiths–Niu-style semiclassical inverse QFT and reuses a single phase qubit.

notes: This artifact expresses each named compiler family as a compositional FT-style call graph with hierarchical bundles and a traversed leaf sigma.
The leaf sigma reconstructs primitive totals, live-qubit contributors, and phase-shell counts from the FT IR rather than from the flattened generated block inventory.
